sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '我' (I) at the beginning introduces a new subject and changes the speaker, which can confuse the meaning of the sentence.
The insertion of '不' (not) in '说的不到' changes the meaning of the phrase, making it incoherent and altering the intended meaning.
